markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Yannick requests detailed project specifications for YOUnuversity.life, a personalized learning platform that generates dynamic courses based on user preferences and adapts in real-time. Manus provides comprehensive MVP specifications including user preference configuration, AI-powered content generation, real-time adaptation mechanisms, and an AI coach feature. The project aims to replace standardized education with truly personalized learning experiences.


## Context & Intent

Yannick wants to create a learning app using Replit and needs detailed project specifications to hand off to developers. The core concept is personalized learning where users can choose various parameters and adjust their learning path dynamically during the course.


## What Was Done

Manus analyzed the concept and produced a comprehensive project specification document including vision, MVP objectives, technical specifications, feature descriptions, and future development phases. Created a mind map structure and detailed implementation approach for the core adaptive learning engine.


## Outputs Produced

- [project_specification] YOUnuversity.life MVP Specification — Complete technical and functional specifications for personalized learning platform MVP
- [system_architecture] Project Mind Map and Structure — Hierarchical breakdown of system components and features
- [development_roadmap] Multi-phase Development Plan — MVP and future version specifications with feature evolution

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Focus on MVP with single output format to validate core concept
- Use LLM API for dynamic content generation
- Implement real-time adaptation based on user feedback
- Include AI coach feature in initial version

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Clear project decomposition into phases
- Detailed technical specifications ready for handoff
- User-centric design approach
Discoveries:

- Real-time course adaptation is the key differentiator
- User feedback loops need to be seamlessly integrated
- MVP should focus on proving the core adaptation concept

## Challenges & Blockers

- LLM API integration and cost management
- Ensuring content quality and educational effectiveness
- Balancing personalization with learning objectives

## Open Questions

- Which LLM provider to choose for optimal cost/quality balance
- How to measure learning effectiveness in personalized courses
- Database architecture for storing user progress and preferences

## Next Steps

- Choose technical architecture and framework
- Define exact LLM prompts for each feature
- Create wireframes for user interface
- Begin MVP development on Replit platform
